description: Composition Black 100% nylon quilted jacket with a front zipper, zipped hand-warmer pockets, zipped pocket on the sleeve, internal pocket fastened with press stud, padded collar, ribbed cuffs on sleeves and at the hem in soft and stretchy 97% cotton and 3% spandex, fully lined in 100% polyester, has Thermore thermal insulation and is filled with lightweight 100% polyester insulation, nike swoosh printed on the left front, and has trims, zipper pulls and cord locks made of recycled waste material Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold, gentle cycle with like colours Do not use softeners Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach; Do not iron; Do not dry clean Tumble dry low face winter with confidence wearing this lightweight but thermal jacket from nike. The quilted black nylon has a slight shine to it making the fabric even more special, and the ribbed cuffs give the cool style of a bomber jacket. Model statistics Product is a size M of height 6', chest 39" shoulders 18"
